title: MCL – Medical Consultants – 53 Posts

basic_details.job_title: MCL Medical Consultants Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 53 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mahanadi Coalfields (MCL) Recruitment 2026 for 53 posts of Medical Consultants. Candidates with MBBS, PG Degree/DNB/PG Diploma Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 11-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through MCL official website mahanadicoal.in.

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 70 years of age during the contract period.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, PG Degree/DNB/PG Diploma in concerned specialty for Specialist. MBBS for GDMO.

salary_details.pay_scale: Consultant (Medical Specialist): ₹8,000/- per 3-hour session. Consultant (GDMO): ₹5,000/- per day.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Mahanadi Coalfields Consultant (Medical Specialist) - Obstetrics & Gynaecology (O&G)
